headline: Keysight and CATARC New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Charging Test Technologies
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., May 05, 2026--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announced an expanded strategic collaboration with China Automotive Technology and Research Center (CATARC) New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center, marked by the establishment of a Joint Innovation Laboratory for Charging Test Technology. This collaboration aims to accelerate innovation in new energy vehicles (NEV) testing, standards development, and charging technologies.

content.title: Keysight and CATARC New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Charging Test Technologies
content.summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., May 05, 2026--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announced an expanded strategic collaboration with China Automotive Technology and Research Center (CATARC) New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center, marked by the establishment of a Joint Innovation Laboratory for Charging Test Technology. This collaboration aims to accelerate innovation in new energy vehicles (NEV) testing, standards development, and charging technologies.
